    Methods in org.patternfly.component.alert that return Alert
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Alert
    Alert.addAction(Button action)
    Wraps the action inside a AlertActionGroup and adds it to this alert.
    Alert
    Alert.addActionGroup(AlertActionGroup actionGroup)
     
    Alert
    Alert.addDescription(String description)
    Wraps the description inside a <p> <p> <p> <p/> element, adds it to a AlertDescription and finally adds it to this alert.
    Alert
